---
title: "Personal Information"
author: "Meshal alotaibi"
date: "2024-02-10"
categories: [technology]
---

## Personal Information

![](thumbnail.jpg)


<iframe width="800" height="800" src="bio_info.pdf">

</iframe>

<iframe width="800" height="800" src="cover_letter.pdf">

</iframe>

<iframe width="800" height="800" src="main_resume.pdf">

</iframe>
